name: megle
description: Windows-first local media browser indexing existing folders.

scripts.check:core-client: npm --workspace @megle/core-client run check && npm --workspace @megle/core-client run typecheck
scripts.test: npm run check:structure && npm run check:core-api && npm run check:core-client && npm run check:desktop && npm run check:web && npm run check:schema && npm run check:rust
